name: l2_powered_source_result_seed

column11: Powered run evidence source for result seeds.

name: l2_static_airframe_run_matrix

note: Static baseline evidence source for baseline subtraction.

name: l2_powered_hover_validation

note: Hover validation target consumed by result seeds.

name: l2_powered_cruise_validation

note: Cruise validation target consumed by result seeds.

name: l2_bridge

note: Bridge result boundary for future live A4MC powered runs.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered body-force or porous-source request support.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered source result evidence.
